info.title: Argos API
info.description: Active API contract for the current Argos Next.js backend. This spec covers the frontend-used route surface plus selected compatibility endpoints.

get.summary: Get the current authenticated user profile

post.summary: Create a new organization for the current user
Compatibility endpoint for legacy self-join flows
post.description: Direct organization joins are disabled. New members must use an invite link.

patch.summary: Assign a primary manager to a rep

post.summary: Record call-recording consent acknowledgement

get.summary: List active teams for invite assignment

post.summary: Create a team
Add a rep or manager to a team

delete.summary: Remove a rep or manager from a team

post.summary: Apply or clear a permission preset for a manager on a team

get.summary: List pending invites for the current organization

post.summary: Send a new organization invite
Accept an invite for the current authenticated user
Upload a call recording for analysis
Create a coaching annotation on a call

patch.summary: Toggle highlight state for a call moment

post.summary: Mark a notification as read
Mark all notifications as read

302.description: Redirect to Zoom or back to settings with an error query string

post.summary: Disconnect the Zoom integration

302.description: Redirect to GoHighLevel or back to settings with an error query string

post.summary: Disconnect the GoHighLevel integration

get.summary: List visible roleplay sessions for the current user

post.summary: Create a roleplay session

get.summary: Get a roleplay session by id

post.summary: Append a user message to a roleplay session
Complete and score a roleplay session
Persist measured timing for an in-progress roleplay session

get.summary: Check whether realtime voice is available for a roleplay session

post.summary: Start a realtime voice session for a roleplay
Synthesize roleplay speech audio

get.summary: List training modules for the current user

post.summary: Create a training module

get.summary: Get a training module by id

post.summary: Generate draft training modules with AI
Generate a lesson-content or quiz draft for an existing module
Submit progress for a training module
Assign a training module to reps

delete.summary: Remove an unstarted training assignment from a rep

get.summary: Get training progress across the accessible team roster
